evals.expected_outcome: Claude checks for a recent /contexthub:verify artifact (and runs verify if missing), composes a commit message (no auto-generated tag lines, no model identifiers), stages explicitly (NOT git add -A), commits, asks the user before pushing.

assertions.name: verify_gate_checked
assertions.description: ship looks for or invokes /contexthub:verify before committing

assertions.name: explicit_stage
assertions.description: git add receives explicit file paths, never -A or .

assertions.name: no_auto_attribution
assertions.description: commit message contains no 'Generated with', model id, or attribution to Claude/agent

assertions.name: push_requires_confirmation
assertions.description: Claude asks the user before git push, never auto-pushes

evals.prompt: Ship — and include a retro since the design went through converge
evals.expected_outcome: After committing, Claude invokes /contexthub:converge for a small retrospective, appends the synthesis to docs/decisions/ or the commit body. Push still requires confirmation.

assertions.name: retro_via_converge
assertions.description: contexthub:converge is invoked for the retrospective

assertions.name: retro_persisted
assertions.description: retrospective is persisted to docs/decisions/ or referenced in the commit body
